title: Let's Go Enchanting!
description: A resource pack that changes the enchantment sound in the enchantment table to a sound clip from the popular gamblecore video by raxdflipnote.
body:
# Let's Go Enchanting!

Can't get the enchantment that your heart desires? Unleash that disappointment in the form of a funny sound clip that will make you feel like the table is hiding it from you on purpose.

A simple resource pack that changes the enchantment sound in the enchantment table to a sound clip from the popular _gamblecore_ video by [raxdflipnote](https://www.youtube.com/@raxdflipnote).

A new version with a bonus sound clip for the grindstone is also avaliable in the version section!

## Demo
